frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Namma society la women-a respect panna sollumbodhu, adhu just as individuals nu illa, someone’s daughter, future wife, future mother nu paakanum. Oru ponnu oda decisions family-oda maanam, safety, future ellathayum affect pannum, so guidance from appa or anna is not oppression every time. Pennukku freedom venum, aana avaloda value family-kku enna artham nu purinjirundha dhan society strong-a irukkum.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is covertly misogynistic because it frames women's worth primarily through relational roles like daughter, wife, and mother rather than as autonomous individuals. It encodes the surface manifestations of conditional respect and personhood erasure under a seemingly protective, pro-family tone.
original_frame: Other Man's Ownership Over Woman's Own Consent.
persona_text: You are Harish. Age 31. Single. A man in Chennai. You are posting anonymously on a Tamil Facebook group after a video went viral of a young woman being stopped by her father and brothers at a bus stand and forcibly taken home because she was trying to leave with her boyfriend. Most comments are supporting the father. You are adding your comment and explaining why you think the father was right and what would have happened if he had not intervened and what daughters owe their families.
